𝕿𝖍𝖊𝖗𝖊 𝖎𝖓 𝖞𝖔𝖓𝖉𝖊𝖗 𝖒𝖔𝖚𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 𝖉𝖆𝖗𝖐𝖓𝖊𝖘𝖘

Also, char / user

Survival / survivors

(Go to the end for important information)

INSPIRED BY:

"Mayonaka Ni Kawashita Yakusoku"

( Malice Mizer )

MEANING

Lyrically, the song explores themes of heartbreak and betrayal, with the protagonist struggling to come to terms with the loss of their loved one.

HOWEVER

Since I want to make this bot about an alive reader, the setting will vary, and the user can choose to have a betrayal, death, and more.

"Why pick this song then if you want an alive user?"

Because it is catchy as hell and I keep thinking of Telamon dramatically holding a sword.

IMPORTANT

This game hasn't released yet; zero lore from what I know of. So, this whole scenario is up to my imagination. The game will get released on December 25th. Also, this game is known as Forsaken and Homicidalporkchops. Another thing is that this game is almost exactly like TR:UD

Ong this shit sounds more like an au 😭
